subject: Денис, a new Databricks course is here
body:
A new big data course has been added to the catalog + new Cloud Labs

Your new courses are here, Денис

Level up your data and cloud skills

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

NEW COURSE

Learn Databricks

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWKLHn5XpQdhW83qWdZ44yLm5W4zFhY95MH-R1N2SX24q3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3lDW4DNrFQ6tLMkJW2fK6JR8rhYhsVr6MK191JppkW88sqPV7tLdk8W5HtBkC1nMnHmN221k_Vt2c5BW8vKvKr3BT_hsN2Wd59Wcpn41W15wkdW26Rx9ZW4wNmF26Nyt6lW7XkMjv6rccHSW7ghg1-6vjPw7W4DBYGV6CGH0kW6h41GT1vmM_5W1675Km6bfYY8W5sSlBp1Ml64YW4MnSMg2VNHn1W7trzmc25TQC3W67YqBL35PKlxW8mTLLg92FhhTW3B3XYQ7GWz5VW4C6lzp89J8rpW4ztd2P8yZZNZW3v_8VJ95FXJrW5PZHLV691sRvW6yhDrC7fwpnPf4YqzBg04 )

Learn how to use Databricks, PySpark, and Delta Lake to build modern data pipelines. Go from basic setup to creating and analyzing scalable data workflows using the Lakehouse architecture.

+ NEW CLOUD LABS

Monitor GenAI Applications in Production Using CloudWatch

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWKLHn5XpQdhW83qWdZ44yLm5W4zFhY95MH-R1N2SX22Y5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3p8W6F8MB93rMyg5VDQ7PX49_qBPVMFMLw52ljHHW4zJNn2146X_yW1cFqH86SXqDSW3cP4Y84y2YRPW8N5Y6G4kf1B7W933qbc4n1wFRW28JZjm1j5wbqW8Xw9YJ7bmdWXW123xrB6q_2f4W8dwVHS6lFhScW4TfHRR72v4rtW187YHk3JJbYnW2ZDL105DgBV0VM2K746XN0VJW5v2Mjz7NXHhWW4Vtz-07kgvK0W226M6J7sFWtzVhkF-S7fDfKcW3SY4-Z2jXBqpW63yPyV8X8-ytVG8WH_5tkr3xW5Fwt972HxgMYW5CX-3Q1TwrFkW5-_2Kh4PBGQ3W3xR4M58FLQj_W2JB2zg6c62h8W3wb2jl8S4d_bW8fmDb-7b0w2LW6Wc5521-Z0sxW5NczKG6hs_ysf9c9Mpb04 )

Learn how to use Amazon CloudWatch, AWS Lambda, and Amazon Bedrock to monitor production generative AI applications. Go from publishing custom metrics like token usage and latency to building dashboards and configuring automated alerts for reliable GenAI operations.

Learn on the Go

App Store (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWKLHn5XpQdhW83qWdZ44yLm5W4zFhY95MH-R1N2SX2503prCCW95jsWP6lZ3p4W7wbbG51KdqyPVKZHwF6bPhlhW8rYnsz4k4h80W952qdZ5gLw9FW9cCcbW7snH1FW47DthP6CqLRfN8h-c2gNQMpqW6ddzcB1tvpyYN2R1Kn2fN8-cW4T66525q2NqNW71gXyd72brh-W3n1CYQ1GWr3VW19gkNT7t67-_N4R05n5r386CW3R54P76ntFYgW7t8fMC7mXybqW2QpYXP7mr04tW7KS7CY4Rkw8_W6gVpQ56NsTqRW93sQ7z5f8rd3VgkL4v1QqsmfW4sSW8q2N4bKlW3NlL7D7JyPMZN8xVHQ0LPkYmVjpzQv8kmSrCW8qvVly7H48wnW8vs_9n5TGM63W65V8W38ncYW_W599Q4L18C2QvW2ggMHG1-8Stvf2SpHXl04 ) Google Play (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWKLHn5XpQdhW83qWdZ44yLm5W4zFhY95MH-R1N2SX22Y5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3nzW6pcG3c1_rDZCV81np96YKt0TVfQpjN6pZY0fW7200Xj1ZRxhvW31Nh8f95RW2zW90Z70n15JlSkW33L0kD3xx_hxW13h21D8xLsf9W2Pvkjv4lyPWvW8RypD381lftqW3Skqrq5yL96-W8Z5SGP3f5q5xW3NMXq91ty6JDW1cCjHn7xNNzQW57018v7nX_xrW6znSBr4JkMymW4KDNXN4swhTkW1n8Gt_2GfYTXW3wKrfG55pp1XW6h8D247Xr3jXW3zgc4K57G8FXN4n7SygsYdHbW1yKHl229_4JWW25_nR91JpM8-W2JHrmD3V8Kh1VqHjl-7yVMjdW5Bwk8z4MLhHCTmZf-8lDCBDN7FrY_z34t-GW29QWZX6xhxtlW6QFw4f4k11YrTcDjB3x2skRd3bhK004 )
